title: Task triggered when subitem is created
excerpt:
hey i would like to know how to triggered a new task in “Todo List” widget is created in a board when a new subitem is created 
thanks

posts.author: amir-law (amir cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey i would like to know how to triggered a new task in “Todo List” widget is created in a board when a new subitem is created
thanks

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amir-law , regarding your automation where when a new subitem is created then create a new task in board is possible using zzBots.

I don’t know exactly how the widgets work in Monday.com but I imagine you could have a widget that displays the task list and any tasks the automation creates would automatically show up.

If you have any questions or need help setting up your automation, just chat with us on our website.
